prompt: 让'半透明文字'的透明度为50%

assertions.name: contains-span-tag
assertions.description: Output should contain an HTML span tag

assertions.name: contains-opacity
assertions.description: Output should contain opacity CSS property with 0.5 value

assertions.name: uses-english-quotes
assertions.description: Style attribute must use English quotes, not Chinese quotes

assertions.name: contains-target-text
assertions.description: Output should contain the target text
